name: Consulting Revenue
description: Income from freelance marketing analytics consulting engagements

name: Other Revenue
description: Any other income not related to primary consulting activity

name: Advertising & Promotion
description: Expenses for promoting consulting services

name: Bank Fees
description: Monthly fees charged by Buckeye Federal Credit Union

name: Business Checking - Buckeye FCU
description: Primary business checking account at Buckeye Federal Credit Union

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Outstanding consulting invoices owed to Andrea Kaminski

name: Accounts Payable
description: Outstanding bills owed for consulting business expenses

name: Professional Development
description: Online MBA tuition, certifications, and analytics courses

name: Software Subscriptions
description: Analytics tools, Tableau, and reporting software subscriptions

name: Home Office
description: Portion of rent and utilities attributable to home office use

name: Travel & Mileage
description: Client-related mileage and occasional travel expenses

name: Meals & Entertainment
description: Client meals and entertainment (50% deductible)

name: GST/Sales Tax Payable
description: Sales tax collected on consulting invoices

name: Estimated Tax Payments
description: Quarterly estimated income tax payments for self-employment income

name: Retained Earnings
description: Cumulative net earnings retained in the consulting business

name: Telephone & Internet
description: Business portion of Verizon phone and home internet service

name: Office Supplies
description: Stationery, printer ink, and miscellaneous office supplies

name: Opening Balance Equity
description: Equity balance when consulting entity was established

name: Contract Labor
description: Payments to any subcontractors assisting on consulting projects

name: Business Insurance
description: Professional liability / E&O insurance for consulting practice
